name: Pingform
description: Send a patient registration form over SMS and receive the details back in real time.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://pingform.io https://*.pingform.io https://pop-notes.vercel.app http://localhost:3000 https://*.pusher.com wss://*.pusher.com https://*.pusherapp.com wss://*.pusherapp.com;
